description: Root-level docs, configs, and backend scripts

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.description: Project main README — architecture diagram, stack summary, API overview, deployment tiers, project layout
nodes.tooltip: 132 lines — project overview, setup instructions, 18 backend modules, 6 workers

nodes.label: components.md
nodes.description: Component architecture — 17 components across 4 tiers (Operational Core, Derived Intelligence, Master & Compliance, Infrastructure) with database connection map
nodes.tooltip: 407 lines — tiered component breakdown, DB connection map, phase build order

nodes.label: data_flow.md
nodes.description: Full PRD — 17 functional modules, stakeholder map, user roles, core DB entities, NFRs, success metrics, product roadmap (Phase 1–5)
nodes.tooltip: 670 lines — PRD covering Auth, Dealer, Beneficiary, Stock, Transactions, Sync, Reports, Audit, AI

nodes.label: full_stack.md
nodes.description: Engineering agent system prompt — production-first principles, forbidden anti-patterns, frontend/backend/database excellence standards, feature completion policy
nodes.tooltip: 358 lines — coding standards & templates for autonomous engineering agent

nodes.label: full_stack_design.md
nodes.description: UI/UX design agent prompt — premium design philosophy, visual hierarchy, layout, typography, color system, component design, motion, a11y, quality checklist
nodes.tooltip: 443 lines — premium frontend design standards for agent-driven development

nodes.label: efps_backend_prd.md
nodes.description: Backend system design & PRD — existing site problems, tech stack decisions, complete folder structure, full DB schema (8 tables), API spec (30+ endpoints), auth/security design, scalability tiers, RBAC, CI/CD, monitoring
nodes.tooltip: 802 lines — authoritative backend design document with schema, API contracts, deployment tiers

nodes.label: solution.md
nodes.description: Complete system design & implementation guide — data sourcing strategy (Playwright sync worker with dealer consent), AES-256-GCM credential security, full architecture, migrations, RBAC, background jobs, CI/CD
nodes.tooltip: 1067+ lines — comprehensive guide with Playwright sync implementation, encryption code, credential security

nodes.label: RUNBOOK.md
nodes.description: Operations runbook — prerequisites, quick start (Docker & Windows), env vars, test accounts, key commands, architecture summary, API docs link, troubleshooting table
nodes.tooltip: 179 lines — setup guide, Docker/native workflow, 10 troubleshooting entries

nodes.label: skills-lock.json
nodes.description: Skills lockfile — pinned 22 agent skills from fabriciosa/w/taste-skill and educlopez/ui-craft with SHA-256 hashes
nodes.tooltip: 149 lines — version 1 lockfile, 22 skills, GitHub sources with computed hashes

nodes.label: delete
nodes.description: Single-line placeholder file containing text 'Redis'
nodes.tooltip: 1 line — likely a note/reminder file

nodes.label: cookies.txt
nodes.description: Empty Netscape HTTP Cookie File — header only, no cookie data
nodes.tooltip: 4 lines — libcurl cookie jar template, no actual cookies

nodes.label: cookies2.txt
nodes.description: Sample cookie data — contains JWT access_token and refresh_token for dealer ID 6fdfc74a, expires 2026-07
nodes.tooltip: 6 lines — captured HttpOnly cookie pair with real JWT tokens

nodes.label: .env
nodes.description: Active backend env config — DATABASE_URL points to localhost:5434/efps_dev, Redis localhost:6379, JWT secrets, AES encryption key, MSG91, CORS for localhost:3001
nodes.tooltip: 50 lines — development environment with MOCK_GOVT_PORTAL=true, START_SYNC_WORKER=false

nodes.label: .env.example
nodes.description: Environment template — mirror of .env with defaults, DATABASE_URL points to localhost:5432 (non-Docker default)
nodes.tooltip: 50 lines — template differs from .env only in PG port (5432 vs 5434)

nodes.label: .gitignore
nodes.description: Git ignore rules — node_modules, dist, .env, .env.local, *.log, coverage, openapi.json, .env.test
nodes.tooltip: 12 lines — standard Node.js ignores plus project-specific patterns

nodes.label: docker-entrypoint.sh
nodes.description: Docker entrypoint script — runs migrations (dist/scripts/migrate.js), seeds in non-production, starts app via exec
nodes.tooltip: 13 lines — runs migrate then seed (dev only) then exec CMD

nodes.label: migrate.ts
nodes.description: SQL migration runner — creates _migrations tracking table, reads src/database/migrations/*.sql, applies pending migrations transactionally, skips already-executed
nodes.tooltip: 74 lines — pg Pool, transactional migration with tracking table

nodes.label: migrate()
nodes.description: Async main function — connects to DB, iterates sorted .sql files, executes each in a transaction with _migrations insert
nodes.tooltip: Exported async function — entry point, calls process.exit on failure

nodes.label: seed.ts
nodes.description: Database seeder — creates admin (00000001), area officer (00000002), 5 dealers (10000001–10000005) with Argon2id hashed passwords, stock allocations, 10 beneficiaries each, commission rates, schools, directory entries, policy schemes, bank info, Gujarat state region hierarchy
nodes.tooltip: 226 lines — full seed with 7 data categories, upsert patterns

nodes.label: seed()
nodes.description: Async seed function — inserts dealers, stock allocations, beneficiaries, commission rates, schools, directory entries, policies, bank info, Gujarat state region (ltree path)
nodes.tooltip: Exported async function — comprehensive seed data factory

nodes.label: generate-openapi.ts
nodes.description: OpenAPI spec generator — builds Fastify app, calls app.swagger(), writes openapi.json to cwd
nodes.tooltip: 22 lines — exports Swagger/OpenAPI spec for frontend codegen

nodes.label: generateOpenApi()
nodes.description: Async function — instantiates app, calls ready() then swagger(), writes JSON output
nodes.tooltip: Exported async function — single-purpose OpenAPI exporter

nodes.label: import-gujarat-csv.ts
nodes.description: Gujarat region CSV/TSV importer — parses tab-separated government census data, inserts/updates gujarat_region_hierarchy and gujarat_aggregate_stats tables at district/taluka/ward levels with NFSA category breakdowns
nodes.tooltip: 287 lines — imports government demographic data into region hierarchy with aggregate stats

nodes.label: tabToCsv()
nodes.description: Converts TSV (tab-separated) text to CSV format, properly quoting fields with commas or quotes
nodes.tooltip: Local helper — transforms government TSV exports to parseable CSV

nodes.label: importLevel()
nodes.description: Async — reads file, parses CSV/TSV, finds/inserts regions into ltree hierarchy, upserts aggregate stats (NFSA categories, card counts, beneficiary counts) per region per month
nodes.tooltip: Async function — core import logic with region hierarchy management

nodes.label: main()
nodes.description: CLI entry point — parses args (filePath, level, month, parentName), validates file, calls importLevel
nodes.tooltip: Async CLI handler — usage: npx tsx scripts/import-gujarat-csv.ts <file> [level] [month] [parentName]

nodes.label: complete-seed.mjs
nodes.description: Supplemental seed — inserts commission rates (Rice 2.50, Wheat 2.00, etc.) and gujarat_directory entries (District Collector, ICDS, MDM, Food & Civil Supplies)
nodes.tooltip: 27 lines — top-level ESM script, no exported functions

nodes.label: list_tables.mjs
nodes.description: Utility script — queries information_schema.tables for all public tables, prints each table_name to console
nodes.tooltip: 5 lines — simple DB introspection script

nodes.label: eFPS Intelligence
nodes.description: Fair Price Shop management platform for Gujarat's PDS — replaces slow government portal with modern secure system
nodes.tooltip: Core project: Fastify + PostgreSQL + Redis + Playwright, 18 modules, 6 workers

nodes.label: Fastify API
nodes.description: Node.js Fastify 5 backend — 18 feature modules, JWT auth, Zod validation, rate limiting, Swagger docs
nodes.tooltip: API at /api/v1 with consistent {success, data, error} envelope

nodes.label: PostgreSQL 16
nodes.description: Primary database — ACID-compliant, table partitioning by month, full-text search, ltree hierarchy
nodes.tooltip: 8+ tables: dealers, beneficiaries, transactions, audit_logs, stock_allocations, sessions, etc.

nodes.label: Redis 7
nodes.description: Cache & queue backend — session store, rate limiting, BullMQ queues, online dealer tracking
nodes.tooltip: Multi-purpose: sessions, rate limits, BullMQ, dealer online status

nodes.label: Playwright Gov Sync
nodes.description: Headless Chromium browser worker — logs into government eFPS portal as dealer, scrapes beneficiary/transaction/stock data, upserts to PostgreSQL
nodes.tooltip: BullMQ worker in separate Docker container, AES-256-GCM encrypted credentials

nodes.label: BullMQ Workers
nodes.description: 6 background workers — govt sync, sync scheduler, SMS OTP, audit flush, daily report, session cleanup
nodes.tooltip: Redis-backed job queues with retry, dead-letter, exponential backoff

nodes.label: AES-256-GCM Encryption
nodes.description: Encryption scheme for dealer government credentials — GCM mode provides authenticated encryption, key stored in secrets manager (KMS/Doppler/Vault)
nodes.tooltip: isolated dealer_credentials table, sync-worker-only access, quarterly key rotation

nodes.label: RBAC
nodes.description: Role-based access control — dealer (own data), area_officer (read-only district view), admin (full access)
nodes.tooltip: authenticate.ts JWT guard + authorize.ts role check middleware

nodes.label: Gujarat Region Hierarchy
nodes.description: ltree-based region hierarchy — state → district → taluka → ward with aggregate beneficiary statistics per region per month
nodes.tooltip: gujarat_region_hierarchy + gujarat_aggregate_stats tables
